generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. We can't afford to wait for another crisis to act. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't just about being tough - it's about being smart. Our allies respect strength, and our citizens deserve protection. #NationalSecurityFirst #SmartDefense
